exercises.stem: There ___ many trees around the house.
exercises.analysis: many trees 是复数名词，there be 句型中 be 动词用 are。

exercises.stem: There ___ an apple and two oranges on the table.
exercises.analysis: 就近原则：最近的主语是 an apple（单数），所以 be 动词用 is。

options.label: A
options.text: There have a park near my home.

options.label: B
options.text: There is a park near my home.

options.label: C
options.text: There has a park near my home.

options.label: D
options.text: There are a park near my home.

exercises.analysis: 表示「某处有某物」用 there be 句型，不能用 there have/has。a park 是单数，用 is。

exercises.stem: In a there-be sentence with multiple subjects, the verb agrees with the subject closest to it.
exercises.analysis: 这就是就近原则：there be 句型中，be 的形式与最近的主语保持一致。

segments: ___2___ (有) two cats and a dog in the garden.
exercises.analysis: 第一句 a library 是单数，用 There is。第二句就近的主语是 two cats（复数），用 There are。

exercises.question: 用 there be 句型描述你的房间：房间里有一张床、两把椅子和一个书架。
exercises.referenceAnswer: There is a bed, two chairs and a bookshelf in my room. 或 There are two chairs, a bed and a bookshelf in my room.
scoringPoints: 正确使用 there be 句型
be 的形式与最近的主语一致
包含地点状语 in my room
